free_text: Levels of 59Co populated in compound-nuclear reactions
A counter telescope consisting of two
silicon surface-barrier detectors. A combination of
20- and 1500-mu-m diodes was used to detect all the
emitted alpha particles and deuterons, as well as
protons up to 6 MeV. A combination of 200- and
1500-mu-m detectors was used to measure the spectra
Targets consisted of self-supporting metallic foils
prepared by electrode position of nickel or iron on
copper followed by selective dissolution of the
backing. The thickness values were determined with an
uncertainty of less than 5% by measurement of the
energy loss in the targets of 241Am alpha particles.
No information on source of uncertainties.
